$comment: Project-scoped MCP server registry for Claude Code. mithril-logs is in-tree (built from tools/MithrilLogMcp). pg-data is fetched on demand by npx from github.com/arthur-conde/pg-data-mcp — no local clone required; npx caches per-commit. The github server is configured per-user in ~/.claude.json under this project entry (not committed) since it requires a PAT in GITHUB_MCP_PAT.
